plugins.name: vasana-system
plugins.description: A vasana is a pattern that recurs across unrelated domains — the "this has the same structure as that totally different thing" realization. Vasana System captures them, tests each for real shared mechanism (not surface resemblance), and resurfaces them when the shape recurs elsewhere — so insight compounds. Memory for forms, not just facts. (Usage-weighted knowledge-graph layer: experimental.)

plugins.name: research-toolkit
plugins.description: Research & investigation skills for thinking-with-AI — investigation protocols (deep-investigation, cui-bono / "follow the money", screening a dev job or employer for hidden military/defense ties), text & source deconstruction, frame rotation, and iterative verification that escalates to a recursive adversarial dialectic (generate a claim's exact opposite and test it). The skepticism is symmetric — turned on the consensus, the contrarian take, the model's own bias, and its own conclusions; it assumes no villain in advance (POSIWID: judge a method by what it does, not what it claims). Includes a transparency MCP.

plugins.name: makers-toolkit
plugins.description: Build-discipline & prompt-design skills: system-pilot (engineering discipline for deterministic systems), intrinsic-prompt-design (meta-methodology of prompt design), and skill-activation-testing (a two-tier A/B for whether a description actually fires).

plugins.name: security-toolkit
plugins.description: Threat-detection and dangerous-action-blocking hooks: tiered prompt-injection detection with allowlist, dangerous git operation blocking (push to main, force push, reset --hard, etc.), and Desktop Commander safeguards
